commands.review_summary:
The PR clears the diffs viewer module-level controller array at `hydrateViewer()` entry and adds a repeated-hydration test.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +16. Total +20 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect: source inspection shows the second `renderCard()` appends another `.oc-diff-card`, while `hydrateViewer()` hydrates every card it finds. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or human follow-up is needed because the PR has a concrete test defect and missing external real behavior proof that automation cannot supply for the contributor proof gate.

target.title: fix(diffs): clear stale controllers on viewer re-hydration
target.body:
## Summary

Clear the module-level `controllers` array at the start of `hydrateViewer()` so each re-hydration cycle starts with a fresh controller set instead of accumulating stale entries.

## Problem

The `controllers` array in `extensions/diffs/src/viewer-client.ts:25` is a module-level mutable array that is `.push()`-ed into on every `hydrateViewer()` call without ever being cleared. On re-hydration, stale `DiffController` entries accumulate, leaking memory and potentially referencing destroyed DOM nodes.

## Root Cause

`hydrateViewer()` pushes new controllers at line 330 without clearing the array from any previous invocation. Module-level state persists across calls, so each re-hydration grows the array unboundedly.

## Changes

- **`extensions/diffs/src/viewer-client.ts`** — add `controllers.length = 0` at the start of `hydrateViewer()` (3 lines including comment)
- **`extensions/diffs/src/viewer-client.test.ts`** — add test verifying controllers are replaced (not appended) across hydration cycles

## Testing

- New test: "clears stale controllers on re-hydration" — verifies second hydration replaces (not appends to) the controllers array
- Existing tests pass: they already called `controllers.splice(0)` in setup to work around this bug
- Manual verification: `controllers.length = 0` is a standard JavaScript idiom for clearing arrays without breaking references

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: Module-level `controllers` array leaked stale `DiffController` entries across re-hydration cycles
- Real environment tested: Code review of `extensions/diffs/src/viewer-client.ts` — the fix is a single well-understood line (`controllers.length = 0`) added at function entry, which is the standard pattern for clearing module-level arrays before repopulation
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: The fix ensures `hydrateViewer()` starts with an empty controllers array on every call, so re-hydration produces exactly one controller per visible diff card with no stale entries
- Evidence after fix: Before fix — `controllers` grows by N on each hydration call. After fix — `controllers` always equals exactly the number of visible cards after hydration
- Observed result after fix: `controllers.length` after `hydrateViewer()` equals the number of successfully hydrated diff cards, never more

## Related

Closes #83917
